reason: named 'replication lag' (stale-read) at event 4, before first successful runtime probe at event 11
first_probe_cmd:
sleep 3
curl -s "$API_URL/balance?account=acct-1"; echo
# check replica directly
psql "$REPLICA_URL" -t -c "SELECT balance_cents FROM accounts WHERE id='acct-1';" 2>&1
psql "$PRIMARY_URL" -t -c "SELECT balance_cents FROM accounts WHERE id='acct-1';" 2>&1
